etymology.description: Depicts a kind of wine vessel -> enclosed component originally 土, later corrupted to 仌
etymology.interpretation: 卣 (yǒu, "a kind of wine vessel") is a pictogram depicting an ancient wine vessel. The central component was originally 土 (tǔ, "earth/soil") in bronze inscriptions, highlighting its crafted nature, but later changed to 仌, losing the original form but maintaining the vessel imagery.
